name: KCC Farmers Market
tagline: Hawaii's biggest and best farmers market — 80+ vendors, incredible prepared food stalls, and a Diamond Head backdrop.
parking: Free parking at KCC campus; fills up fast
bestTime: Arrive at 7:30am Saturday opening; by 9:30am the best items sell out
talkStory: The biggest and best farmers market in Hawaii takes place every Saturday morning at Kapiolani Community College near Diamond Head. About 80 vendors sell everything from fresh-pressed sugarcane juice and macadamia nut ice cream to fried green tomatoes and local honey. The prepared food stalls are a destination unto themselves. Locals arrive right at 7:30am for the best selection. The Tuesday evening market is smaller but less crowded.
